title: AI Assistant Configuration
description: Configure your AI Assistant powered by OpenAI-compatible API

baseUrl.title: API Base URL
baseUrl.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible API (include /v1 if needed)

model.title: Model
model.description: Model name to use (e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, claude-3-5-sonnet)

systemPrompt.title: Custom System Prompt
systemPrompt.description: Additional instructions for the AI (optional). The base system prompt is always included.

maxToolRounds.title: Max Tool Rounds
maxToolRounds.description: Maximum number of tool call rounds per message (prevents infinite loops)

contextTaskLimit.title: Context Task Limit
contextTaskLimit.description: Maximum number of active tasks to include in context
